public_commands.name: research
public_commands.input: Resolved Agent Request / Research Assignment JSON
public_commands.description: Return candidate funding opportunities with evidence, provenance, preliminary fit signals, negative evidence, and freshness.

public_commands.name: explain
public_commands.description: Explain why a candidate surfaced and show the source trail behind it.

public_commands.name: status
public_commands.description: Report whether the ledger is fresh enough and which required source lanes were checked.

background_capabilities.name: source refresh
background_capabilities.description: Refresh source lanes when stale before research.

background_capabilities.name: feed smoke
background_capabilities.description: Validate feeds and page sources for maintainers.

background_capabilities.name: grants xml ingestion
background_capabilities.description: Reconcile bounded Grants.gov bulk extract scans into the ledger.

background_capabilities.name: federal register hydration
background_capabilities.description: Resolve weak Federal Register signals into canonical formal notices.

background_capabilities.name: fts5 search
background_capabilities.description: Retrieve candidate ledger records for research and explanation.

background_capabilities.name: usearch semantic retrieval
background_capabilities.description: Use local usearch over the opportunity/evidence corpus as the preferred semantic candidate finder; fall back to FTS5 when unavailable.

background_capabilities.name: read-only sql
background_capabilities.description: Inspect the local ledger during development.

background_capabilities.name: opml export
background_capabilities.description: Export feed manifests for source review.

runtime_constraints: the upstream LLM agent uses the CLI
the CLI itself must not call an LLM
semantic retrieval prefers local usearch and falls back to SQLite FTS5

prototype_cli.reason: The current CLI has research/explain/status, source plumbing under debug, Grants.gov API/XML ingestion, Federal Register hydration, and a passing agent dogfood harness. Ship hardening remains focused on freshness scheduling, richer source-lane coverage, and Printing Press acceptance.
